title: OSS compliance dashboard view + status pill

steps.description: Database: project_oss_job table + ORM model (async job tracking for scan/prepare/publish)
Code review: S01 (table shape, FKs, enums, downgradeable migration)
Backend service: dashboard/services/oss_service.py — job queue/executor, throwaway worktree lifecycle, SSE helpers, Tier-1 probe, freshness helper, orphan recovery
Code review: S03 (subprocess hygiene, worktree cleanup, SSE backpressure, monotonic state transitions, orphan recovery)
API: dashboard/routers/oss.py (page + 8 endpoints including SSE); register router in app.py
Frontend: pages/project/oss.html + 7 fragments (pill, status frame, domain card, tool-run card, install modal, CLI block, scan progress); add OSS frame under Git Status; conditional OSS tab
Joint code review: S05 (API) + S06 (Frontend) for API↔template contract, htmx headers, SSE integration, accessibility
Tests: boundary + SSE + invariant integration tests (test_oss_dashboard_boundary, test_oss_dashboard_sse, invariant coverage)
Code review: S08 (Boundary Behavior + Invariant coverage, testcontainer compliance, red-before-green)
Final cross-layer review: DB → service → API → template coherence, AC coverage (AC1–AC7), no regressions, CLAUDE.md compliance
QV: Browser verification — pill rendering, Install modal flow, Scan + SSE progress, results tree, Prepare/Publish CLI block, stale banner, no regressions on sibling views
